utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items are included and specified.

I matched each named item to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings: 'Waterfront Property' under purchase_properties, 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing, 'Basic Legal Package' and 'Premium Legal Package' under essential_legal_services, 'Basic Survey' and 'Full Structural Survey' under property_surveys_inspections, 'Self-Move' and 'Standard Moving' under moving_services, and 'Basic Utilities' and 'Premium Utilities' under utility_setup.
